name: THE SHAPER ContourSystem
shortDescription: Multifunctional, premium body and facial treatment system with 4 technologies: vacuum massage, RF, infrared laser and 40 kHz ultrasonic cavitation.
description: THE SHAPER is not a 'fad device', but the synergy of clinically proven technologies in a single unit. RF for collagen production, cavitation for fat reduction, vacuum + roller for connective tissue, infrared laser for cellular stimulation – a complete contouring system for face and body treatments.
metaTitle: THE SHAPER ContourSystem | RF + cavitation + IR + vacuum
metaDescription: THE SHAPER – Premium body and facial treatment system with 4 proven technologies: vacuum RF, 40 kHz cavitation, 940 nm IR laser and roller massage.

videoDescription.headline: THE SHAPER – 4 technologies, one device, complete body contouring
paragraphs: Its strength lies not in a single technology, but in the combination: RF tightens, cavitation breaks down fat, vacuum + roller improves circulation and connective tissue, infrared boosts every effect. This synergy delivers faster, more visible changes and higher client satisfaction.

A single platform can treat the entire body and face. Modern touchscreen control, 4 different applicators, and clinically proven biological mechanisms – not multiple devices, but one well-thought-out system.

final.headline: Interested in THE SHAPER ContourSystem?

featureRows.headline: Why choose THE SHAPER?
featureRows.subtitle: The synergy of 4 clinically proven technologies in a single system.

features.title: Vacuum RF treatment – deep firming
features.description: Radiofrequency energy generates heat in the dermis (down to 5-15 mm depth), which immediately contracts collagen fibres (instant tightening) and stimulates fibroblasts to produce new collagen. The vacuum and roller mechanism lifts the tissue, allowing the RF to act deeper while increasing blood and lymphatic circulation.

features.title: 40K ultrasonic cavitation – physical fat reduction
features.description:
The 40 kHz ultrasound creates microbubbles in the fatty tissue, the collapse of which mechanically damages the membrane of fat cells. The released fat is removed via the lymphatic system and naturally broken down by the body.

What this means in practice:

Inch loss after just a few treatments
Targeted localised fat pads
Improved body contours
Physical (non-thermal) fat reduction

features.title: 940 nm infrared laser – cellular booster
features.description: The 940 nm infrared light penetrates deeply into tissues, raises the temperature, and improves oxygen supply and microcirculation. Through photobiomodulation, it stimulates cellular metabolism and collagen production while amplifying the effect of the other technologies. This is a 'booster' technology – strongest not on its own, but in synergy.
features.highlight: A powerful booster that enhances the results of every other technology.

features.title: Roller mechanical massage – endomassage principle
features.description: Built on the principles of LPG / endermology: the special rollers mechanically mobilise connective tissue, loosen adhered fibrous structures, and stimulate the lymphatic system. This is critical because cellulite is not just fat, but also a connective tissue problem. Combined with RF, the effect is far stronger.
features.highlight: The principle of LPG endermology – a clinical method proven over decades.

features.title: Full body + face, for every age group
features.description:
Personalised treatments offer solutions for various age groups.
20-30 years: prevention, skin quality
30-45 years: skin laxity, cellulite
45+ years: firming, contouring
Face, neck and décolleté too

training.headline: Comprehensive, practice-focused training
training.intro: With THE SHAPER device, we provide all the knowledge needed for safe and effective treatments. The materials are organised into a structured, easy-to-follow system, so you can deliver high-quality service from day one.
items: Treatment protocols for every body area
closingParagraphs: Live model practical training is also available (+79.990 Ft) – in real treatment situations, with professional guidance, you can master the correct treatment techniques and protocols.
The basic training package is included free with the device purchase.
training.freeText: Basic training is FREE with the device purchase!
training.duration: Basic package: self-study | Live training: 1 day

expertQuote.quote: THE SHAPER's strength lies not in a single technology, but in the combination of 4 proven procedures. RF + cavitation + vacuum + infrared – each is clinically proven on its own, and together they deliver much stronger, faster results.

functionCards.name: 40 kHz cavitation
functionCards.description: Up to 60 W ultrasound, physical fat reduction.

functionCards.name: 4 applicators
functionCards.description: Body + face handpieces in one system.

faq.question: Why is it better than single-technology devices on the market?
faq.answer: 4 technologies in one device: no need for multiple separate units. Thanks to the vacuum + RF combination, the treatment goes deeper (5-15 mm), not just on the surface. The mechanical roller treatment is outstanding against cellulite. The infrared + RF synergy delivers faster, more visible results. A single platform can treat the entire body + face.

faq.question: How many sessions make a course?
faq.answer: Clients usually notice an improvement in skin quality after just a few sessions, while by the end of the full course (typically 6-10 sessions) body contours can become more harmonious. The exact protocol depends on the target area and the client's condition – the training package includes a detailed protocol for every body area.

faq.question: Which body areas can be treated?
faq.answer: Face and neck (forehead, eye area, cheeks, double chin, jawline, décolleté) – the goal is firming and wrinkle reduction. Body (abdomen, waist, hips, buttocks, inner+outer thighs, upper arms, back, lumbar region) – the goal is contouring, cellulite reduction and skin tightening.

faq.question: How does the endomassage (LPG) principle work?
faq.answer: The special roller and vacuum mechanism works through the skin and the underlying tissues. It loosens adhered connective tissue, improves oxygen and nutrient supply, and supports the removal of waste products. The procedure was originally developed for medical and rehabilitation purposes (e.g. scar treatment, improving circulation), and was later adopted by the cosmetic industry.

faq.question: What results can the client expect?
faq.answer: Firmer, denser skin, reduced wrinkles, visible improvement in cellulite, better skin tone and circulation. Inch loss in the treated area. Results may vary by individual and are influenced by lifestyle, the condition of the connective tissue, and adherence to the treatment protocol.

faq.question: What is included in the price?
faq.answer: The complete training package (materials, body contouring specialist textbook, lifestyle advice, client education materials, consent forms, treatment protocols), 2-year warranty, English user manual. Live model training is optional at +79.990 Ft. Exact price during consultation.

whatsIncluded: Complete training package (materials + body contouring textbook)
Client education materials and consent form templates
Treatment protocols for every body area
